target: 43. Tide's Video

(…And the two of us arrived
at Mt. Takanosu)
Why did you follow me?!

You're the one who followed me!
I said I was going to Mt. Takanosu!

I made a promise with Shiori!
I'm going to investigate the Shadow!
You don't need to worry!!
Is that so?!

That's right!!
If there's even the slightest suspicious movement, I'll be in trouble!!
Alright!!
…Huh…

(We've walked around a lot, but found nothing.
I guess we'll have to head down before it gets dark…)
Hey, come over here for a second!!
What's wrong?

Look, there's a path ahead.
But…
"Warning: No Entry Beyond This Point"——
When you see a sign like that, you can't help but want to go in, right?
I see.
But it's about to get dark——
Hey, let's go.

Ah!
Wait a second!?

You're in trouble if we don't go back right now!!
Are you even listening??
…You won't listen…I'm going already!!

Wait!
I'm coming too!!

I see…!!
This place…

Look, that sign…"Hishigata Clinic".
Isn't that the old ward window??

Seems like it.
The one that's said to have ghosts…
I've never seen it before…
…Let's look inside through the window.
U, yeah…

Whoa~~~,
It's completely trashed in there…scary…!!
I'm really scared of ghosts…
You too?!
Then why are you going in so boldly?!
…This must be the entrance.

Wait…are you going in?!
Are you really okay?!

I'm not okay…but…
I don't know why…
I feel like I've been here before…

D-did someone just…?
Is there someone there?!
(Wh-what is that…?)
Ugh!
What?!

(Th-those black things…their shapes…
they're becoming more human-like…)

(That face…it's me!!
This…this is a…Shadow!?)
Dangerous!!
Thank you…

(Wh-what just happened…
My arm felt like it stretched…?)

Wh-what is that…
It's changing again…

Guh…!!
Ugh…!

Ah…let go!! 
Damn it!
What is this…damn it!!

Th-this…!!
Let go of her!!
Ugh…!
(No way…it's not working…)
You bastard!!
(Oh no——)
Gh!
Geho, geho!

(It worked…!
It should have been gone…! What's going on?!)
Gh…!
Whoa!?
Gh…!?

(I was stabbed! 
It's not my leg, but…
this pain…!)
(What if…the Shadow's weakness is…)

(I see…I understand…!
I clearly felt it in my body now…!)
Vaaassh!!
Here it comes!!
(I'm not human——)

(My real body is a flat shadow——
the three-dimensional one is——)
(A weapon to protect the flat form…!!)
…Hah, hah…!!

You…
What was that…

That was amazing!! 
You're so cool…!!
…That's right!!

Come on, get up!
Take my hand!
Yeah…

…You hurt your leg.
I should treat it.

This wound won't heal even if I treat it…
It's in the original data…
Data!?

I'm a Shadow.
I copied you during the garbage collection event.
I remember that…

…But I can't remember anything before that.
I think it was overwritten.
Overwritten…what does that mean?

If I erase my original Shadow parts, I would have to overwrite them with Ushio's data…
and erase them.

That's why I think I'm Ushio…
Haha…I'm such an idiot…

Maybe the copy failed?
I don't know anymore…
Or maybe I was just a defective copy…

Then let's overwrite it again!
That way, your injury will heal, right??

Theoretically…
But is it okay…?
I'm your Shadow…
It doesn't matter if it's okay or not!!

If you hadn't protected me, I would have died!
I don't want to owe you anything…!

Are your shoes and socks in the way?
Wait a second.
I'll take them off right away.

Here!!
That settles it!!
…Fuh…

I won't say thanks!!
Saying thanks to myself…it's creepy…
Then, let's do it.

Wow~~~!!
It's healed!

I didn't copy the memories.
Actually, I can't…

If I overwrite again,
I'll stop being myself…
So I only copied the right leg's data.
"Data" like that?

I don't know how to say it well, but that's the general idea.
But this copied data…
I think it'll disappear after a while…

If I erase the original, the copy will become the real one
and be able to exist in this world…

Erase…meaning…kill?
You'll disappear if I die?!

Probably…
I don't know, but I have that feeling…

Normally,
I'd have to kill the original…

Wh-what kind of thing…
Seeing a Shadow means death…
That's what it is…!!
Shiori is in danger…!!

…We should go back.
This place isn't safe anymore.
July 19
(The next day, the 19th was heavy rain…)

(The Shadow's abilities,
we did various experiments)
(…In conclusion——)

(If this child's power is available,
we might be able to defeat the Shadow)
(…That night…)

(This child watched over Shiori all night. 
  They said shadows don't need to sleep.)

(…No one should get involved in such a dangerous thing.
We two have to handle it somehow…)
(…But…)
(If you fight the Shadow, there's danger to your life)
"That's why… I wanted to leave the truth behind in case something happened…"
July 20

(…July 20th.
We're recording this video like this…)

Shinpei is currently 
  in what kind of situation? 
  I don't know…――

I'll do what I need to do. 
  Shinpei will do what he needs to.
What else was there… Oh right!

If you leave for Tokyo, I'll be angry if you don't see me off properly! 
  Because I'm cheering for Shinpei!!

Later then!
  Bye-bye!
